{{CargoRelic
|name=Electromagno Repeller
|class_id=20354
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Powered primarily by solar energy, this suppressor can store up to three times the electricity required for it to operate at full power. It can generate a strong electromagnetic field to paralyze all electronic devices in range. Its powerful output and recharge-free function have been widely praised by users!
|fame=16
|art=18
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=29
|ss1=Against Racky, DMG +300%
|ss2=Against Racky, DMG +400%
|ss3=Against Racky, DMG +500%
|ss4=Against Racky, DMG +500%
|ss7=Against Racky, DMG +500%<br> (Awakened)
}}
